category.title: Category
category.description: A high-level agricultural subsidy category (e.g., Irrigation, Equipment).

name.description: The name of the category in multiple languages.

description.description: The description of the category in multiple languages.

icon.description: The name of the Lucide icon to display.

order.description: The display order of the category.

subcategory.title: Subcategory
subcategory.description: A specific subsidy type within a category (e.g., Drip irrigation, Tractors).

categoryId.description: The ID of the parent category.

name.description: The name of the subcategory in multiple languages.

description.description: The description of the subcategory in multiple languages.

order.description: The display order of the subcategory.

thirdGradeSubcategory.title: Third Grade Subcategory
thirdGradeSubcategory.description: An optional third-level classification for subsidies.

subcategoryId.description: The ID of the parent subcategory.

name.description: The name of the third grade subcategory in multiple languages.

description.description: The description of the third grade subcategory in multiple languages.

subsidyDetail.title: Subsidy Detail
subsidyDetail.description: Detailed information for a subcategory or third grade subcategory.

subcategoryId.description: The ID of the parent subcategory (if no third grade subcategory).

thirdGradeSubcategoryId.description: The ID of the parent third grade subcategory (optional).

conditions.description: The conditions for the subsidy in multiple languages.

rates.description: The subsidy rates in multiple languages.

docs_pre.description: The pre-project documents required in multiple languages.

docs_post.description: The post-project documents required in multiple languages.

plafonds.description: The subsidy caps (plafonds) in multiple languages.

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Collection of high-level agricultural subsidy categories.

/subcategories/{subcategoryId}.description: Collection of specific subsidy types within a category.

/subsidy_details/{detailId}.description: Collection of detailed information for a subcategory.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of users and their roles.
